title: Gaea's Hand
categories: Daily Hitmen Demon Chest Drop Boost

params.name: Gaea's Hand
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.06%)
params.description:
On Mar 25, 2006 BC, Gaea, goddess of Earth, formed this broken arm.

Gaea's hand broke free from the ground. It is full of harmony, youth, and strength. It gives the people a spark of vitality. We could see both creation and destruction, order and chaos in her primal nature.
